# Standarization

Standarizes a vector or matrix, i.e., scales all the values in a way
that the transformed values will be within the range \[0, 1\].

## Usage

``` r
stdx(x, ...)
```

## Arguments

- x:

  vector, matrix or data.frame to be scaled

- ...:

  further arguments passed to or from other methods

## Details

\$\$z = \frac{x - x\_{min}}{x\_{max}-x\_{min}}\$\$

## Author

Mauricio Zambrano-Bigiarini, <mzb.devel@gmail>

## See also

[`scale`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/scale.html),
[`istdx`](https://hzambran.github.io/hydroTSM/reference/istdx.md)

## Examples

``` r
############
## Loading the monthly time series of precipitation within the Ebro River basin.
data(EbroPPtsMonthly)

# Standarizing only some values of 'EbroPPtsMonthly'
stdx(as.matrix(EbroPPtsMonthly[1:70,10:13]))
```
